Print model formula with styled header

Source: R/utils_display.R
dot-cat_formula.Rd

Displays a model formula (Cox, CRR, or logistic) with a styled box and separator. Automatically detects model type from the number of distinct outcome levels and presence of a time variable.

Usage

.cat_formula(
  data,
  co_var,
  time = "time",
  outcome = "DSS",
  type = c("info", "success", "warning", "error")
)

Arguments

data

A data.frame containing the outcome column.

co_var

Character vector of covariate names.

time

Character or NULL. Name of the time variable (NULL for logistic models).

outcome

Character. Name of the outcome variable (default "DSS").

type

One of "info", "success", "warning", "error".
